text: Cuz you only need three things to win.
You can write this down. The balls to
start, the brains to learn, and the
heart to never quit. And the good news
is you already have all three. You're
just not using them. Because
fundamentally, if you found somebody and
they started and they continue to get

would win. Just think about it from

"Okay, think of a person who only did
one thing and all they dedicate their

and getting better and better at that

you think that person would not be
incredibly successful? Of course they
would be. Then why aren't you doing it?
The problem is it's never been easier to
start a business. It's also never been
easier to do nothing at all. And this is

things that are getting in your way,

"I want to move those up over time."
Like, "Okay." And then food-wise, like
do you want to probably eat more protein

So, my perception of time shrinks. I
